project_type: React+TypeScript game (Zustand state management, Vite bundler)
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit to check type safety, then npx vite build to verify production build
environment_constraints: No test suite available, validation is via TypeScript compiler and Vite build
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch, commit all changes together
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts, game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts, UI components in src/components/. State is immutable (spread patterns). calculateForce in gameLogic.ts is the authoritative force calculation used by both RegionDetailModal and BattlePanel. getFigureForce in RegionDetailModal is a display-only per-figure force function.
directory_structure: src/store/ (Zustand store), src/utils/ (game logic), src/components/ (React components), src/types/ (TypeScript types), src/i18n/ (internationalization)
